visual_prompt_hint: Side-by-side comparison: Part A (Hospital Insurance) vs Part B (Medical Insurance)
prompt: Side-by-Side Comparison. Left: Part A, Hospital — Hospital stays, Nursing, Hospice. Usually free. Right: Part B, Medical — Doctor visits, Lab tests, Vaccines. $203/month. Title: Medicare A vs B.
spelling_check: PASS — v1 had Outphient, v2 had Inpatent/Outpbient, v3 used shorter labels to avoid misspellings
